name: Joe Biden
subject: An announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Thank you for everything you did to support this campaign in June. |
---
Peter,

Like many of you, I spent this past weekend, on Independence Day, reflecting on the founding ideals of our nation.

We have faced dark moments before in our history. We're in one now. **But one of the lessons of history is that often those who fan the flames of hate end up drawing forth the next great wave of progress.**

We have a chance -- now, in November and beyond -- to give the marginalized, the demonized, the isolated, the oppressed a full share of the American dream. We have a chance to rip the roots of systemic racism out of this country.

_We have a chance to live up to the words that founded this nation -- that we are all created equal._

We remain locked in a battle for the soul of this nation. But believe me -- truly -- it is a battle we can win. _And we will win._

Which is why, Peter, I'm humbled and honored that you have put your trust in me as your presumptive Democratic nominee. And I'm incredibly honored by the support I've received from you all.

Last week, we announced that we raised $141 million in June together with the DNC. It is an incredible number, and I wanted to share more details about our campaign's fundraising, Peter, since you are a critical part of it.

**Among the $141 million raised in June, our average online donation was just $32.47. Grassroots donations make up 97% of our fundraising.**

The money we have to spend on winning this race is a long way from where we were just a few months ago, in no small part thanks to all who have joined this team and invested in our success.

But thanks to Donald Trump's three-year head start, we still trail his campaign slightly when it comes to the resources we need to win this thing. We have a strong trajectory, and if we outraise him again this month, I do believe we can surpass him.

[**Peter, can you help me keep up the momentum? We 're going to need it if we want to outraise Trump and the RNC again in July and close the cash on hand gap. If you can help us keep up this pace into July, I may give you a call to thank you myself:**](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_callfromjoe-q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.07_B2_jrbnumbers_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.07_B2_jrbnumbers_X__F1_S1_C1__full") | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
---
| | [$5 ➞](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_callfromjoe-q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.07_B2_jrbnumbers_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.07_B2_jrbnumbers_X__F1_S1_C1__full&express_lane=true")

| [$250 ➞](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_callfromjoe-q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.07_B2_jrbnumbers_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=250&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.07_B2_jrbnumbers_X__F1_S1_C1__full&express_lane=true")
---
| [Other ➞](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_callfromjoe-q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.07_B2_jrbnumbers_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.07_B2_jrbnumbers_X__F1_S1_C1__full")
---
I understand what these dollars mean. When facing uncertainty and fear, you all chose hope. I will never forget that.

And I promise that when I'm president, I won't let you down. Together we'll bring real change. As I've said many times, this is the United States of America. And there's never been a single thing we haven't been able to do -- when we've done it together.

I'm in awe of this sum of money. Just a few months ago, people were ready to write this campaign off. People were certain that the Democratic Party could not come together, unite, and build a campaign stronger than Trump's operation.

They were wrong. We are making huge dents in Donald Trump's war chest. We get closer to catching up every month, and we are diminishing his three-year head start.

And that's how we'll make sure he is only a one-term president.

Thank you for everything you did to support this campaign in June. We wouldn't be where we are now without you, and I'm grateful to you from the bottom of my heart.

Let's go win this thing, together.

Joe
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bef7/1cd0ac28/88b37d92/357cf428/1171505267/VEsO/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bef7/1cd0ac28/88b37d92/357cf427/1171505267/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bef7/1cd0ac28/88b37d92/357cf426/1171505267/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bef7/1cd0ac28/88b37d92/357cf425/1171505267/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bef7/1cd0ac28/88b37d92/357cf424/1171505267/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bef7/1cd0ac28/88b37d92/357cf423/1171505267/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bef7/1cd0ac28/88b37d92/357cf422/1171505267/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bef7/1cd0ac28/88b37d92/357cf421/1171505267/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bef7/1cd0ac28/88b37d92/357cf420/1171505267/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bef7/1cd0ac28/88b37d92/357cf41f/1171505267/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bef7/1cd0ac28/88b37d92/357cf422/1171505267/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bef7/1cd0ac28/88b37d92/357cf41e/1171505267/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bef7/1cd0ac28/88b37d92/357cf421/1171505267/VEsEBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bef7/1cd0ac28/88b37d92/357cf41d/1171505267/VEsEBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team
Paid for by Biden for President

name: Team Hagerty
subject: #TeamHagerty President Trump Endorsement, County Leadership Release
body:
#TeamHagerty Updates Straight To Your Inbox
No images? [Click here](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-e-pijydky-fuutjhhtj-tj/) July 7, 2020 **President Trump Is On #TeamHagerty** [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pijydky-fuutjhhtj-r/) Building on his endorsement, last week President Trump tweeted his support of Bill Hagerty's campaign for U.S. Senate for the second time. First, he tapped Bill to lead his Tennessee Victory team, then to help lead the Trump Transition Team in 2016. Then the President asked Bill to represent our great nation overseas as the U.S. Ambassador to Japan. President Trump gave Bill his complete and total endorsement before Bill announced his campaign, and then President Trump personally asked Bill to join his Great American Economic Revival Industry Groups to help re-open the American economy. Now, President Trump has endorsed Bill's campaign again because he knows Bill is the ally he needs in the Senate.You can read Bill's statement about the President's continued support in the press release **[HERE.](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pijydky-fuutjhhtj-y/)** **Over 1,000 Local Leaders Are On #TeamHagerty** [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pijydky-fuutjhhtj-j/) Team Hagerty announced over 1,000 endorsements from government officials, business leaders, law enforcement officers and community leaders across all 95 counties joined President Trump in endorsing Bill Hagerty for U.S. Senate last week. We are continuing to gain momentum every day, and we can't do it without you! To read the full release announcing this grassroots coalition of support, visit our website **[HERE.](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pijydky-fuutjhhtj-t/)** **Follow @BillHagertyTN On Parler** [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pijydky-fuutjhhtj-i/) Bill Hagerty announced yesterday that he has joined the social media platform [Parler.](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pijydky-fuutjhhtj-d/) Social platforms like Twitter and Facebook are censoring and even silencing conservative voices and the coastal elites of Silicon Valley are relentless with their bias against conservative viewpoints. The radical Democrats leading these social media companies will continue to censor us until we think like liberals. That's why Bill and Team Hagerty have joined Parler. Follow [@BillHagertyTN](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pijydky-fuutjhhtj-h/) for another great way to follow along and connect with Team Hagerty. You can read the release about this announcement **[HERE.](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pijydky-fuutjhhtj-k/)** **ICYMI: Majority Leader William Lamberth Is #TeamHagerty** [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pijydky-fuutjhhtj-u/) Majority Leader William Lamberth of Sumner County, Bill's home county, released an editorial in the _Tennessee Star_ yesterday endorsing Bill's campaign to represent Tennessee in the U.S. Senate. We are so proud to have so many local leaders across the state supporting Team Hagerty. You can read the full editorial in support of Bill by clicking** ****[HERE.](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pijydky-fuutjhhtj-m/)**
## **Be A Part Of #TeamHagerty**
[TELL US WHY YOU SUPPORT BILL HAGERTY](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pijydky-fuutjhhtj-c/) [DONATE TO THE CAMPAIGN](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pijydky-fuutjhhtj-q/) [VOLUNTEER WITH #TEAMHAGERTY](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pijydky-fuutjhhtj-a/)
## **Press Highlights**
**[TN Star:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pijydky-fuutjhhtj-f/) **Bill Hagerty Issues Statement After Iran Issues Arrest Warrant for Donald Trump**[WBBJ:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pijydky-fuutjhhtj-z/) **Bill Hagerty Makes Campaign Stop In Jackson**[Shelbyville Times-Gazette:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pijydky-fuutjhhtj-v/) **Letter to the Editor: Bill Hagerty Will Work To Lower The Nation's Debt**[Townhall:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pijydky-fuutjhhtj-e/) **Bill Hagerty: If Chief Justice Roberts Wants To Legislate, He Ought To Run For Office**[TN Star:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pijydky-fuutjhhtj-s/) **Bill Hagerty Announces Small Businesses for Hagerty Coalition**[TN Star:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pijydky-fuutjhhtj-g/) **Tennessee Planned Parenthood Members Burn American Flag in Defense of Abortion**[Moore County News:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pijydky-fuutjhhtj-w/) **Bill Hagerty Visits Lynchburg
## **What They're Saying...**
> _"__Tennessee loving Bill Hagerty, who was my Tennessee Victory Chair and is now the very outstanding Ambassador to Japan, will be running for the U.S. Senate. He is strong on crime, borders & our 2nd A. Loves our Military & our Vets. Has my Complete & Total Endorsement!"_
> [-President Donald Trump](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pijydky-fuutjhhtj-yd/) _" Bill was really a member of Team Trump before it was politically advantageous - before anybody else said let's jump on board, and he's been ready to work with President Trump since day one and he wants to do the same for Tennessee families."_
> [-Lara Trump](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pijydky-fuutjhhtj-yh/) _" Bill was on the Trump train before it was politically expedient. My father trusts him, he believes in him. For my father to have endorsed Bill Hagerty early in a primary, tells you all you need to know about the man."_
> [-Donald Trump Jr.](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pijydky-fuutjhhtj-yk/)_" Ideologically, Bill is an unapologetic and a very proud conservative, and what I mean by that is he's for free markets, he is for freedom, not free stuff, and he respects the dignity and the liberty of each individual, and I know that's what makes him a conservative."_
> [-Kellyanne Conway](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pijydky-fuutjhhtj-yu/) _" Bill has been a good friend, he was a great ambassador to the US in Tokyo and he is going to be a fantastic senator. If there is one word I would use to describe Bill it's fearless. Bill helped solidify and strengthen our relationship with Japan which is absolutely essential to us standing up to China. Believe me, I can tell you that Beijing noticed the minute Bill got on the ground."_
> [-Sen. Tom Cotton](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pijydky-fuutjhhtj-jl/) _" Bill Hagerty is TERRIFIC! Can't wait to call him Senator Hagerty come November!"_
> [-KT McFarland](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pijydky-fuutjhhtj-jr/) _" We are excited to endorse Bill Hagerty for Senate and are fully confident he will be an unwavering pro-life advocate. Bill has served his country and President Trump with distinction, and we're thrilled to see him bring his leadership to the United States Senate where he will continue to make Tennesseans proud."_
> [-Marilyn Musgrave](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pijydky-fuutjhhtj-jy/) _" We need leaders like that on the floor of the U.S. Senate because frankly, the next couple of years are going to be about the Great American Come Back. The Great American Revival. That's why we need Bill Hagerty."_
> [-Larry Kudlow](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pijydky-fuutjhhtj-jj/) _" I know that Bill Hagerty is a good quality Republican. He knows the value of conservative judges and is going to fight to support President Donald Trump. The President and I will continue to come back and support Bill Hagerty."_
> [-Nikki Haley](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pijydky-fuutjhhtj-jt/) _" Let me take a moment to say what a blessing it is to have someone like Bill Hagerty. He is not only my friend but he's done a great job...as the Ambassador to Japan. But not only that, he is a huge supporter of law enforcement. I can't tell you how much he's helped me personally and...in Putnam County."_
> [-Eddie Farris, Sheriff](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pijydky-fuutjhhtj-ji/) _" You may have questions about who to vote for and who to get out and elect this campaign season, and I want you to know where I stand. I stand with Bill Hagerty because of the fine values he has and he supports our President Donald J Trump. I ask for you to get out there and support Bill Hagerty and his campaign."_
> [-Mayor Robby Hatcher](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pijydky-fuutjhhtj-jd/)
| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pijydky-fuutjhhtj-jh/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pijydky-fuutjhhtj-jk/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pijydky-fuutjhhtj-tl/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pijydky-fuutjhhtj-tr/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pijydky-fuutjhhtj-ty/)

You can read the release about this announcement ICYMI: Majority Leader William Lamberth Is #TeamHagerty Majority Leader William Lamberth of Sumner County, Bill's home county, released an editorial in the Tennessee Star yesterday endorsing Bill's campaign to represent Tennessee in the U.S. Senate. We are so proud to have so many local leaders across the state supporting Team Hagerty. You can read the full editorial in support of Bill by clicking Be A Part Of #TeamHagerty Press Highlights Bill Hagerty Issues Statement After Iran Issues Arrest Warrant for Donald Trump Bill Hagerty Makes Campaign Stop In Jackson Letter to the Editor: Bill Hagerty Will Work To Lower The Nation's Debt Bill Hagerty: If Chief Justice Roberts Wants To Legislate, He Ought To Run For Office Bill Hagerty Announces Small Businesses for Hagerty Coalition Tennessee Planned Parenthood Members Burn American Flag in Defense of Abortion Bill Hagerty Visits Lynchburg What They're Saying... "Tennessee loving Bill Hagerty, who was my Tennessee Victory Chair and is now the very outstanding Ambassador to Japan, will be running for the U.S. Senate. He is strong on crime, borders & our 2nd A. Loves our Military & our Vets. Has my Complete & Total Endorsement!" " Bill was really a member of Team Trump before it was politically advantageous - before anybody else said let's jump on board, and he's been ready to work with President Trump since day one and he wants to do the same for Tennessee families." " Bill was on the Trump train before it was politically expedient. My father trusts him, he believes in him. For my father to have endorsed Bill Hagerty early in a primary, tells you all you need to know about the man." " Ideologically, Bill is an unapologetic and a very proud conservative, and what I mean by that is he's for free markets, he is for freedom, not free stuff, and he respects the dignity and the liberty of each individual, and I know that's what makes him a conservative." " Bill has been a good friend, he was a great ambassador to the US in Tokyo and he is going to be a fantastic senator. If there is one word I would use to describe Bill it's fearless. Bill helped solidify and strengthen our relationship with Japan which is absolutely essential to us standing up to China. Believe me, I can tell you that Beijing noticed the minute Bill got on the ground." " Bill Hagerty is TERRIFIC! Can't wait to call him Senator Hagerty come November!" " We are excited to endorse Bill Hagerty for Senate and are fully confident he will be an unwavering pro-life advocate. Bill has served his country and President Trump with distinction, and we're thrilled to see him bring his leadership to the United States Senate where he will continue to make Tennesseans proud." " We need leaders like that on the floor of the U.S. Senate because frankly, the next couple of years are going to be about the Great American Come Back. The Great American Revival. That's why we need Bill Hagerty." " I know that Bill Hagerty is a good quality Republican. He knows the value of conservative judges and is going to fight to support President Donald Trump. The President and I will continue to come back and support Bill Hagerty." " Let me take a moment to say what a blessing it is to have someone like Bill Hagerty. He is not only my friend but he's done a great job...as the Ambassador to Japan. But not only that, he is a huge supporter of law enforcement. I can't tell you how much he's helped me personally and...in Putnam County." " You may have questions about who to vote for and who to get out and elect this campaign season, and I want you to know where I stand. I stand with Bill Hagerty because of the fine values he has and he supports our President Donald J Trump. I ask for you to get out there and support Bill Hagerty and his campaign."_ | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Team Hagerty P.O. Box 150748 Nashville, TN 37215 |

subject: Open Borders under Joe Biden
body:
Is Joe Biden soft on immigration?
| [ ](https://hs-6023921.t.hubspotstarter-ir.net/e2t/tc/VVB3HH2S-9c1W5KQwJ74gLlWFW3yn_R_4cgh2FN4qMxKN3lGmQV1-WJV7CgJn8W16-BDK8qV6LKW236lFb4YQ-VwW5cg7Z_54ZfqnW9h7ZjH3w3m3CW5KSYM193TSqqW7y1T4-3QxFRwW7F2LWt2St0yXN4gjZpxbf0xtW5Qc9tx84R5NpW648SY91Q9TSnW88X8XP47ZFW9W5y3mtd7xg8mMW4w__Pr2zz6PSW4S5QQj1Tc-LCN29td3pZ-nDGW3Qnqzg4WrfWXW4S277343qCMqW3q2zlz3v-1DPN4bMPHH58dTRW8XPrkz1MCXCSV_w00X4dbhlNW5bQb_M31tlDb3c6N1)
---
|
---
Hey Peter, Immigration has been a difficult topic for the Democratic Party. To dissuade that skepticism, Biden has taken an alternative path: opening his platform to be more liberal than ever. By voicing support for sanctuary cities and/or open borders, Biden is pushing himself farther and farther to the left, turning off moderate and conservative voters. [Is Biden the best guy for this job?](https://hs-6023921.t.hubspotstarter-ir.net/e2t/tc/VVB3HH2S-9c1W5KQwJ74gLlWFW3yn_R_4cgh2FN4qMxJV5kbT5V3Zsc37CgQpnN5R9FqPJ1hpTW546C_M8f19VzVxBd635hwJbCW91rr1N7vFJhJW1twDFy8tNmP9W7x27fL1dDw8PN6r9KWmn3JbkW7LmwMF7p_h4VW39-x2m6TRwmPW1zzfg68SpVdXW8MPRBX2YD0DsW7WlP306X2Z7CN81Tykj53LL5W6KQCxg6KxM96W7TrT4F1hvvHnVdYkdh3H9qfgW5CbMW136Kg8mW8LhSKw2q2V1_W6BqMGq7MS6PYW2s6DvR6NQQPsF5MLZQT9h6yW8zpqGw7R3zybW1DBP1b8NSqXPW3Gckcs1PDGd0VFNt4c6n7DPLV65Qnh3r_JqbW6MCt6b3PKKGfW8pz1ML7BsqLKW6pPF6Y23MNmsW9g9Q4S1Nnp1-W4bDlNk4Lp8YkW41rh7l3v6MJf2lm1)

name: Abigail Sigler
subject: Team Hagerty Polling Update
body:
**MEMORANDUM**
To: Team Hagerty
From: Dave Sackett, Tarrance Group
Date: July 1, 2020
Re: Key Findings From A Survey Of Likely Republican Primary Voters In TennesseeThe Tarrance Group is pleased to present Hagerty for U.S. Senate with the key findings from a survey of voter attitudes among likely Republican primary voters in Tennessee. These key findings are based on telephone interviews with N= 651 "likely" Republican primary voters statewide. Responses to this survey were gathered June 28-30, 2020, and the margin of error associated with a sample of this type is + 4.0% in 95 out of 100 cases.**KEY FINDINGS**
* Bill Hagerty stands with a commanding +17 lead over the field in the Republican primary election for the U.S. Senate. Forty-six percent (46%) of Republican primary voters indicate they would vote for Bill Hagerty, while 29% would vote for Manny Sethi, and 5% indicate they would vote for George Flinn. There are 2% who would vote for one of the other candidates, and 18% are undecided.
* Hagerty has a double-digit advantage on this ballot test among primary voters in both the Nashville, Knoxville, Memphis and Tri-Cities media markets, and absolutely dominates the ballot among the most conservative parts of the primary electorate.
* Bill Hagerty is getting over 50% of the vote among 4 of 4 primary voters, 65+ voters, those who strongly approve of the job that President Trump is doing, those primary voters who are strongly pro-life, and those primary voters that get their news and information from Fox News.
* Awareness of President Trump's endorsement of Bill Hagerty continues to grow, and there are now fifty-seven percent (57%) of Republican primary voters across the state who are aware of President Trump's endorsement. Among those Republicans who are aware of President Trump's endorsement, fully fifty-eight percent (58%) are voting for Hagerty.
* Bill Hagerty is also far and away in the best position of any of the candidates in terms of familiarity and image. Bill Hagerty's name ID among Republicans across the state is up at ninety-one percent (91%) and there are 72% of Republican primary voters that have a favorable impression of him.
* Just as important, primary voters throughout the state also already have a strong sense of Hagerty as a true conservative. Two-thirds of Republican primary voters across the state indicate they believe that Bill Hagerty shares their conservative beliefs and principles.

# # #

Simply put, Peter, they’re getting nervous.
The momentum that we have built for the last few months has not gone unnoticed, and your support, advocacy, and voice are the only reasons we are where we are right now, Peter.
In their cry for help, Nancy Pelosi tossed around the fact that our campaign has had some of the largest endorsers in the nation, our strong fundraising numbers, and the fact that Susan Wild is facing one of the most difficult re-elections this cycle, all due to my loyal supporters like YOU who have made it very clear that PA-07 is ours for the reclaiming. name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Seven Democrats...
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_walz_powers_seven_dwarfs&n=1)
---
Peter -- The only thing standing between our freedoms and the Tyrant-in-Making Tim Walz’ Emergency Powers is seven Democrats in the MN House. Let me explain. **We began our battle to End Walz’ Emergency Powers at the beginning of April with our champion in St Paul, Rep Jeremy Munson. At the time, only 15 legislators were on board with us. The Republican and Democrat establishment opposed your freedoms.** **** But by the end of April, we were able to get all 59 Republicans in the House to vote for the bill to terminate Walz’ powers. House Democrats and the Senate Republicans were against us. Then in June, we forced the Senate Republicans to do the right thing and they passed the resolution with three Senate Democrats voting in favor of it. _The vote came back up in the Minnesota House, and that time, two Democrats got on board. Unfortunately, all of the remaining Democrats cared more about protecting their party’s governor than you and my freedom. So sad._ Walz is abusing his power every day and it could get a lot worse. He’s moving to force us to wear masks and he recently hinted at shutting down our economy again. Walz is clearly power hungry! **But here’s the good news. We can finally end Walz’ powers and return our freedom if just seven more rural Democrats, who are in Trump districts, get on board with us!** Let me introduce you to the Seven Dwarfs...I mean, DFLers. Can you help us get these Democrats on board? I’ve been impressed with how many Action 4 Liberty supporters have reached out to legislators every time we ask them. It’s making a huge difference. We need you to light up these Seven DFLers' phones and email accounts right NOW. **Grumpy – Rep John Persell - 651-296-5516 /[rep.john.persell@house.mn](mailto:rep.john.persell@house.mn)** **Happy – Rep Dave Lislegard - 651-296-0170 /[rep.dave.lislegard@house.mn](mailto:rep.dave.lislegard@house.mn)** **Sleepy – Rep Julie Sandstede - 651-296-0172 /[rep.julie.sandstede@house.mn](mailto:rep.julie.sandstede@house.mn)** **Bashful - Rep Rob Ecklund - 651-296-2190 /[rep.rob.ecklund@house.mn](mailto:rep.rob.ecklund@house.mn)** **Sneezy – Rep Jeanne Poppe - 651-296-4193 /[rep.jeanne.poppe@house.mn](mailto:rep.jeanne.poppe@house.mn)** **Dopey – Rep Dan Wolgamott - 651-296-6612 /[rep.dan.wolgamott@house.mn](mailto:rep.dan.wolgamott@house.mn)** **Doc – Rep Jeff Brand - 651-296-8634 /[rep.jeff.brand@house.mn](mailto:rep.jeff.brand@house.mn)** **Script** _**:** _ _Rep __________, Governor Walz' emergency powers are doing more harm to Minnesota families and businesses than good. We can’t have one person deciding what rules we need to follow. It’s time you restore our Democracy and exercise your legislative power to End Walz’ Emergency Powers now. Otherwise I’m going to do everything in my power to help your opponent this November._ Don’t have the time to contact them? Help us out by [contributing](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_walz_powers_seven_dwarfs&n=2) to our digital ad campaign targeting voters in their districts. Here’s a preview of one of the ads we’re running. | [](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_walz_powers_seven_dwarfs&n=3 "CONTRIBUTE") [CONTRIBUTE](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_walz_powers_seven_dwarfs&n=4)
---
Let’s put an end to Walz’ Emergency Powers and put freedom back in your hands. It’s time Minnesota wakes back up.
## **[Help us be that wake up call!](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_walz_powers_seven_dwarfs&n=5)**
**In Liberty,**
****
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_walz_powers_seven_dwarfs&n=6).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_walz_powers_seven_dwarfs&n=7).
Created with [NationBuilder](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_walz_powers_seven_dwarfs&n=8), software for leaders.

subject: COVID-19 testing. Now.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sánchez |
body:
As COVID-19 cases continue to rise nationwide, the Trump administration has decided to cut off funding for public testing sites.

Make no mistake -- this decision will have disastrous consequences, especially in Black and Latino communities which are disproportionately affected by COVID-19. If we're going to stop the spread of COVID-19, people need to know if they are contagious or not.

That's why it's imperative that we take a stand against President Trump's ill-sighted decision. Right now, Linda is demanding the Trump Administration resume adequate funding for public testing sites.

Will you join her and the thousands of others who are standing up to President Trump by signing your name?

Thank you,

-- Team Sánchez

----------------------------------------

Washington DC 20003 United States

name: Sandy Smith
subject: Dems won't condemn violence!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
| | | [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gKQVWWc_9pNxmng&b=2aAb7BYQ4MqDIzCPFQ_QRw)
---
Dear Peter,

**I am Sandy Smith, the Republican nominee for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district.**

I'm a fighter, and I will fight against Nancy Pelosi and for America, every chance I get. I will fight for the rule of law!
I can't believe there are Democrat mayors and governors who are excusing the violent rioters- and, in fact, encouraging them!
It's not just one or two. The entire Democrat caucus in Congress approves of, and encourages, the violent rioters!
How do we know this?
_**House Democrats unanimously blocked a resolution condemning acts of violence and rioting—including the "deliberate targeting of law enforcement officers"** —in the wake of George Floyd's death._
_The resolution, which was introduced by Rep. Greg Steube (R., Fla.) late Thursday morning, condemned Floyd's killing at the hands of police, calling it "inconsistent with the values and conduct expected of law enforcement officers." The resolution also supported peaceful protesters, but it noted that protests have been "exploited by violent extremists" carrying out "acts of violence, looting, destruction of business and personal property, and additional loss of life."_
_Rep. Jim Jordan (R., Ohio) spoke in favor of the resolution, arguing that while Floyd's death was "wrong as wrong could be," there is a "big difference between peaceful protest and rioting." Jordan also spoke against defunding the police, calling it "one of the craziest public policy proposals I have ever seen."_
_No House Democrats voted in favor of Steube's resolution. Rep. Justin Amash (I., Mich.) voted with Republicans to support the measure._
[What do I need to convince you of the hopelessness of the Democrats](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gKQVWWc_9pNxmng&b=2aAb7BYQ4MqDIzCPFQ_QRw)? They literally cannot bring themselves to vote against the targeting of police officers, violence or rioting.
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gKQVWWc_9pNxmng&b=2aAb7BYQ4MqDIzCPFQ_QRw)
---

**_My opponent, G.K. Butterfield, the Deputy Democrat Whip, voted in favor of violent riots - riots that destroyed black neighborhoods, murdered innocent people, and targeted police. _**

_In an impassioned press conference Sunday night, Atlanta Mayor Keisha Lance Bottoms issued a full-throated call for citizens to stop "shooting each other up on our streets," after an 8-year-old girl was shot and killed on the Fourth of July near a Wendy's that has become a flashpoint of anti-police Black Lives Matter (BLM) protests in the city._

_Bottoms, a Democrat who is considered a potential running mate for Joe Biden, made the remarks as she fought through tears -- and the nation endured a new bout of urban carnage. Sixty-three people were injured and 17 killed in Chicago, including two children, over the weekend; and in New York City, 44 were hurt and at least six killed._

\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

body:
Open to join exclusive focus group -

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18179342/219763293/-1290848981?refcode=em_fr_2020.07.08_TS_b1_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGMwN2Q1Ni00OGMxLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s85ka5KOmnH2M7U8hgHdM3hk-USV7AzQNAT27KFH0NA=)
---
| _Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas.

Please visit our [COVID-19 community resource guide](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18179343/219763294/-466961882?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGMwN2Q1Ni00OGMxLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s85ka5KOmnH2M7U8hgHdM3hk-USV7AzQNAT27KFH0NA=&emci=59ae2a9b-31c1-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=e8c07d56-48c1-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=14145524) to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe._

* * *
Friend --

**You’ve been selected to join a focus group of voters from all across the country to share what’s at stake for you in this election.**

Our team takes this focus group very seriously. It’s an opportunity to connect with voters on what issues resonate with them as they make their plan to vote -- _and it helps our team tailor our campaign to what the people of our district need the most._

[**We need your help as we build our campaign strategy for July and the rest of the campaign. name: MJ Hegar Policy Team
subject: We aren't fighting COVID-19 everywhere
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
We've seen COVID-19 cases skyrocket, and yet, we're ignoring a vulnerable community.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890150/7f51f7bc/412e6dc8/4ef606db/948377808/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter, COVID-19 cases are continuing to spike across Texas, and people are starting to pay attention. However, immigrant detention centers are going widely unnoticed as the pandemic continues.

In one Texas detention center, immigrants have declared a hunger strike to protest the lack of protections from COVID-19. It's simply unacceptable that Sen. Cornyn hasn't done anything about these conditions. **[Sign the petition: Demand Sen. Cornyn take action>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890150/7f51f7bc/412e6dc8/4ef606da/948377808/VEsE/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-immigrationpetition")** **Unfortunately, it 's not surprising.** Sen. Cornyn's campaign received thousands of dollars from private detention center corporate PACs, and it's pretty clear that his loyalty lies with the corporate special interests funding his reelection.

**[Sign MJ's petition demanding that Sen. Cornyn take action to improve conditions in immigrant detention centers >>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890150/7f51f7bc/412e6dc8/4ef606da/948377808/VEsF/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-immigrationpetition")**

We need to fix our immigration system, not profit off it. \-- Team MJ

**[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890150/7f51f7bc/412e6dc8/4ef606d9/948377808/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2NzUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoff?refcode=email_20200708.1__1675__&amount=10")**
---

|

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890150/7f51f7bc/412e6dc8/4ef606d8/948377808/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2NzUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1675&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.

subject: Adam Kinzinger joins Tucker Carlson's shameful attacks on Tammy Duckworth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dani for Illinois
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/07c0de0354cf/adam-kinzinger-joins-tucker-carlsons-shameful-attacks-on-tammy-duckworth?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
Adam Kinzinger spent yesterday morning using social media to join Tucker Carlson in attacking Senator Tammy Duckworth. **Tucker claimed Senator Duckworth hates America.[Adam jumped on his Facebook page and said she doesn't have "guts."](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=3e59131e87&e=140a9b81e7)**

Senator Duckworth lost both of her legs while serving her country as a US Army pilot. She's sacrificed more than Tucker Carlson could ever imagine, and she certainly has guts, despite what Adam Kinzinger claims.

There's a reason that Adam Kinzinger would rather hurl outlandish attacks at Senator Duckworth to fan the flames of a culture war than talk about the issues. **Adam Kinzinger is worried about losing his seat, and he's doing this to score cheap political points with his base.**

What he said was divisive, inappropriate, and a slap in the face to veterans everywhere. [Click here to chip in and help us beat him this November.](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=c76e5abe62&e=140a9b81e7)

The people of this country and the people of IL-16 deserve better representation. I can't wait to unseat Adam Kinzinger.

Dani Brzozowski
Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16

subject: Jackie Walorski’s abandonment of life.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pat Hackett for Congress
body:
| | | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=a0c98e2795&e=5886ca081d)
---
| | | **Sacrificing our citizens was
“more than beneficial”**
---
| [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=e480c506ca&e=5886ca081d)
---
| Dear Friend,

Jackie Walorski has all but said that the deaths of hundreds of thousands of Americans are worth the benefit of re-opening businesses.
---
| [INVEST IN COHERENT PUBLIC POLICY →](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=09b50bbaba&e=5886ca081d "INVEST IN COHERENT PUBLIC POLICY →")
---
| Jackie Walorski, the person who is supposed to represent us, refuses to demand a coherent national public health response to COVID-19, and peddles the wares of short term job growth in exchange for the deaths of older Americans, deaths of persons with pre-existing conditions, and the disproportionate deaths of persons of color.

Jackie Walorski’s Trumpian tweets often claim a “pro-life” stance, but the reality is that as of today, July 8, 2020, the U.S. has 3,048,072 cases of COVID-19 (50,940 new from yesterday) and 133,322 deaths (902 new from the prior day). Older Americans account for 8 out of 10 of these deaths, and cases are exponentially increasing as states incoherently open. Meanwhile, Donald Trump calls for fewer tests while holding deathtrap rallies.
---
| [INVEST IN COHERENT PUBLIC POLICY →](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=8698fe5f6c&e=5886ca081d "INVEST IN COHERENT PUBLIC POLICY →")
---
| This is not a reverence for life. Reverence for life requires both coherent national public policy and responsible economic policy. Instead, Jackie Walorski is a loyalist to an incompetent and cruel administration.

[**Will you help us replace her? Let’s begin the real work of reverencing life.**](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=23dba16b47&e=5886ca081d)

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Trump and Lopez Obrador Will Talk Long-Term Solution to Illegal Immigration
body:
This afternoon, President Trump will welcome President of Mexico Andres Manuel Lopez Obrador to the White House | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=90229e53c4&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Trump and Lopez Obrador Will Talk Long-Term Solution to Illegal Immigration**

This afternoon, President Trump will welcome President of Mexico Andres Manuel Lopez Obrador to the White House, where they will discuss “a long-term strategy to target illegal migration,” Anna Giaritelli writes in the _Washington Examiner_.

In addition to decreasing illegal immigration, historic cooperation between the United States and Mexico recently led to President Trump’s NAFTA-replacing United States-Mexico-Canada Agreement (USMCA), which took effect one week ago today.

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a594a32534&e=3ee4985eea)

**Watch live at 3:35 p.m. ET** : [Joint Declaration signing](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7128aca179&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| In the wake of Coronavirus, “we now see a looming crisis for schools and child care. If it's left unaddressed, it will exacerbate the economic crisis caused by the pandemic by preventing parents across the country from returning to work, and continue to widen the socioeconomic gap,” House Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy writes in [_USA Today_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=09b106543a&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “The daughter of a slain New York City police officer spoke out against the vilification of cops taking place amid the nationwide protests against police brutality,” Joshua Nelson reports. “People like my mom, who was the most amazing person in my life, deserve to not be executed the way that she was because just because of her uniform,” Genesis Villella said. Read more in [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=960c16458e&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “By the telling of the intellectual classes, conservatism is the ideology of the elite . . . [but] conservatism is the natural disposition and political home of the working classes, invested in stability, protections for families, and supportive of the formative institutions of civil society, especially religious institutions,” Patrick Deneen writes in [_The American Conservative_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0992a2db10&e=3ee4985eea).
---

I’m fighting for real change -- the kind that we all see in our everyday lives, not empty partisan talking points.

| In 2018, progressive Democrat Mike Siegel turned Texas' 10th district from a safe GOP seat to a national battleground -- and in 2020, he's going to finish the job. [**I’m rejecting corporate PAC money, and our run-off election is in 6 days, so your $5 or $10 will make all the difference for our people-powered movement:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18181312/219803907/677720892?refcode=SGL_EM_FR_200708_GOTV1_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2JmNzNhZS01N2MxLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cab-uqrhl2zvGDTCPrPlf51LGGh93ywCiYs94cObLPA=) | | | [Chip in →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18181313/219803908/677720892?refcode=SGL_EM_FR_200708_GOTV1_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2JmNzNhZS01N2MxLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cab-uqrhl2zvGDTCPrPlf51LGGh93ywCiYs94cObLPA=)

* * *
As a former public school teacher, I know firsthand that education is not the equalizer we all want it to be -- **some schools get million-dollar football stadiums and others can’t replace 20 year old textbooks.**
As a civil rights lawyer, I helped women who suffered discrimination in the workplace, immigrant families, firefighters, low-income renters, and those demanding stronger gun regulations.**I saw just how much injustice permeates the very fabric of our society.**
People are crying out for change -- and we can’t and won’t wait any longer. _There’s too much at stake._
In 2018, I came just four points shy of ousting Republican Michael McCaul. **This year, I’m going to finish the job.** If you’re ready for a more compassionate government -- one with an eye toward equity, science, and opportunity for all, [**I’m asking you to chip in to my Democratic campaign to help us hit our $10,000 Run-Off Election goal in the next 6 days:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18181314/219803909/677720892?refcode=SGL_EM_FR_200708_GOTV1_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2JmNzNhZS01N2MxLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cab-uqrhl2zvGDTCPrPlf51LGGh93ywCiYs94cObLPA=)

I’m working for a future where a hard day’s work is enough to put a roof over your head and food on your table, where healthcare is a guarantee, and where the zip code you’re born into doesn’t decide whether or not you can attain the American dream.
**I’m fighting for _real_ change** \-- the kind that we all see in our everyday lives, not empty partisan talking points. That’s why this fight means so much to me, and I hope it means just as much to you.
Thank you,
Mike

name: Kate Roberts, Powered By People
subject: Beto captured this photo of our amazing volunteer team
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Powered By People

At our virtual phone bank on Monday, volunteers made 316,000 phone calls
to voters across Texas! Just look at this slice of our amazing team that
Beto captured:

But next, we have to do even more, and we can’t do it without you.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42642?source=ema20200708-96791&t=1001&akid=96791%2E444211%2EOm7k6s ]Will you be part of the team that’s going to flip the Texas State House
and stop Trump forever? RSVP for our next phone bank on July 16th right
now.

Virtual Voter Contact Phone Bank with Beto
Thursday, July 16
7 pm - 9 pm Central

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42642?source=ema20200708-96791&t=1002&akid=96791%2E444211%2EOm7k6s ]RSVP

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42644?refcode=ema20200708-96791&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=96791%2E444211%2EOm7k6s ]If you can’t make calls on July 16th, please pitch in to help Powered
by People volunteers organize instead. Every dollar helps keep our dialer
and other tech systems running.

Hope to see you on the phone bank!

Best,

Kate

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1004&akid=96791%2E444211%2EOm7k6s

name: Rabbi Michael Beals
subject: Joe Biden is a mensch.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
The story I'm about to share with you about Joe Biden is special -- in fact, I'm fairly certain I'm the only living person left who actually witnessed it firsthand. |
---
_Peter, this is an email from the "I Know Joe Biden" email series.

Please, take the time to read below and get to know Joe Biden. And once you're done reading, can you chip in to send him back to the White House to represent us? **[Chip in to elect Joe Biden here»](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.08_B2_rabbiIKJ_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=36&amounts=36,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.08_B2_rabbiIKJ_X__F1_S1_C1__ac")**_ | [DONATE ➞](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.08_B2_rabbiIKJ_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=36&amounts=36,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.08_B2_rabbiIKJ_X__F1_S1_C1__ac")
---
* * *
The story I'm about to share with you about Joe Biden is special -- in fact, **I 'm fairly certain I'm the only living person left who actually witnessed it firsthand.**

It was about 16 years ago, and I was a young rabbi, brand-new to Delaware, on my way to lead a _shiva minyan_ \-- a worship service following a death of a Jewish person. I was from California. Back then, I didn't know Claymont, Delaware from Scranton, Pennsylvania.

A quick bit of background: When someone passes away in the Jewish faith, we observe seven days of mourning, called _shiva_. We gather a group of ten Jewish adults together -- a _minyan_ \-- to say the _Mourners ' Kaddish_. It usually happens in a person's home -- somewhere intimate.

In this case, the deceased individual -- her name was Mrs. Greenhouse, of blessed memory -- had not been a person of means. She had lived in rent-controlled senior housing in a tall high-rise building off of Namaans Road. Her apartment had been too small to fit everyone into, so we conducted our worship service in the building's communal laundry room, in the basement of the high-rise.

We assembled the ten elders together, and it was in this most humble of places that I began to lead the _kaddish_. Toward the end of the service, a door at the back of the laundry room opened, and who walks in but Senator Joe Biden, his head lowered, all by himself.

I nearly dropped my prayer book in shock.

**Senator Biden stood quietly in the back of the room for the duration of the service.**

At the close of the _kaddish_ , I walked over to him and asked the same question that must have been on everyone else's mind: "Senator Biden -- what are you doing here?"

And he said to me: "Listen, back in 1972, when I first ran for Senate, Mrs. Greenhouse gave $18 to my first campaign. Because that's what she could afford. And every six years, when I'd run for reelection, she'd give another $18. She did it her whole life. I'm here to show my respect and gratitude."

Now, the number 18 is significant in the Jewish faith -- its numbers spell out the Hebrew word _chai_ , as in "to life, to life, _l 'chayim_!" But it's also a humble amount. Joe Biden knew that. And he respected that.

There were no news outlets at our service that day -- no Jewish reporters or important dignitaries. Just a few elderly mourners in a basement laundry room.

**Joe Biden didn 't come to that service for political gain. He came to that service because he has character. He came to that service because he's a mensch.**

And if we need anything right now when it comes to the leadership of our country -- we need a mensch.

I know this is such a simple, small story. But I tell it to as many people as will listen to me.

Because I think that, in their heart of hearts, when people are trying to think about the decision they'll make this year -- this is the kind of story that matters.

Joe Biden is a mensch. We need a mensch.

Thanks for reading.
[](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.08_B2_rabbiIKJ_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=36&amounts=36,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.08_B2_rabbiIKJ_X__F1_S1_C1__ac")
---
\-- Rabbi Michael Beals of Delaware
Thanks for reading! We hope you feel like you know Joe Biden, too, Peter.

We are only 40 days and 40 nights away from the Democratic National Convention next month where Joe Biden will become our official Democratic nominee for President.

**If you 're able, will you chip in something today? Whether it's a humble $18, or if it's $5, any amount is appreciated:**

If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

| Friends, Last week was a busy one for the team and I. I had a wonderful time in Ocala on Tuesday night at a meet and greet. I want to thank the Bianculli Family and all of the patriots that came to the event.
I hope each of you had a wonderful Independence Day weekend. The team and I attended several parades this weekend. We loved participating in the Palatka Indepence Day Parade and the Town of Orange Park Vehicle Parade.

This past Saturday was Independence Day. I hope you all had a safe and wonderful day.
We celebrate the foundation of liberty and freedom, which make America the greatest country in the world. I am so humbled to be celebrating over 240 years of this Nation's greatness.

| |

We also spoke about where I stand on the issues that are important to the community in FL-03.

body:
You are receiving this email from 314 Action Fund because you've previously expressed interest in our efforts. If you'd rather not get all of our updates you can [click here](https://act.314actionfund.org/page/m/29bb7f0c/4bd7760e/5f3320e6/77a9b37a/3721318688/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://314action.org/less-email/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_200708_3M-2xop_none_1_Trumpwho&source=314_EM_FR_200708_3M-2xop_none_1_Trumpwho&refcode=314_EM_FR_200708_3M-2xop_none_1_Trumpwho") for only the most important emails, or you can click [here](https://act.314actionfund.org/page/m/29bb7f0c/4bd7760e/5f3320e6/77a9b379/3721318688/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZQUWtaVlUwTkJWRVZFVWtWRFNWQkpSVTVVU1VRbEpRPT0iOiI1ZjMzMjBlNiIsIkpTVlBRa1pWVTBOQlZFVkVUVUZKVEVsT1IxTkZUa1JKUkNVbCI6IjI5YmI3ZjBjIn0%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://act.314actionfund.org/page/oneclickunsubscribe/5f3320e6/29bb7f0c?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=2+-+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_200708_3M-2xop_none_1_Trumpwho&source=314_EM_FR_200708_3M-2xop_none_1_Trumpwho&refcode=314_EM_FR_200708_3M-2xop_none_1_Trumpwho") to unsubscribe.
| | BREAKING: Trump notifies Congress that he intends to rapidly withdraw the US from the World Health Organization during the PEAK of an unprecedented pandemic.
---

Now that Trump is withdrawing from the WHO, we need your help to flip the Senate and elect more Democratic scientists to office.

We've got 24 hours to drive another wave of support to our endorsed candidates so that they can get the message about how dangerous this is out, from the perspective of a scientist.

[Can you click here and donate $5 or more to help elect Mark Kelly, Dr. Barbara Bollier, John Hickenlooper, Dr. Cameron Webb, and more?](https://act.314actionfund.org/page/m/29bb7f0c/4bd7760e/5f3320e6/77a9b378/3721318688/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiIsImUzdGhjMnQ5ZlE9PSI6IjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-july-who?amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=3+-+Can+you+click+here+and+donate+ask+or+mor&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_200708_3M-2xop_none_1_Trumpwho&source=314_EM_FR_200708_3M-2xop_none_1_Trumpwho&refcode=314_EM_FR_200708_3M-2xop_none_1_Trumpwho")

314 Action is a grassroots community of over 2.1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.

name: Bill Olson
subject: So sick of these crazies!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hnMnSaqE0_6OuRU&b=jaJ6nJ0lyHdSDOkjYA_kqA

Hi Peter,

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet running to take back Florida’s competitive 9th District, currently held by Socialist Democrat Darren Soto. And I need your help to be YOUR champion in Congress!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hnMnSaqE0_6OuRU&b=jaJ6nJ0lyHdSDOkjYA_kqA

The reason the extreme Left is attacking everyone and rioting is because they know they can't win elections. Look at the sort of policies they like!

-Tearing down historical statues

-Abolishing the police

-Abolishing the Constitution

-Attacking with violence anyone who disagrees with them

-Abolishing churches and Christianity

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hnMnSaqE0_6OuRU&b=jaJ6nJ0lyHdSDOkjYA_kqA

These people don't want to do away with just Confederate statues. THEY WANT TO DO AWAY WITH AMERICA!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hnMnSaqE0_6OuRU&b=jaJ6nJ0lyHdSDOkjYA_kqA

Part of their plan to do away with America is to get rid of the rule of law. Our country was founded on "Equal Justice Under Law".

But what the radical Left- this "new" Democrat party- wants is NOT freedom, NOR liberty.

What they want is chaos, destruction, and murder. But I don't!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hnMnSaqE0_6OuRU&b=jaJ6nJ0lyHdSDOkjYA_kqA

They with to take away your freedom and replace it with a Communist dictatorship.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hnMnSaqE0_6OuRU&b=jaJ6nJ0lyHdSDOkjYA_kqA

I am not a career politician or a slick fundraiser. I'm a career soldier who wants to defend our country against all enemies- foreign and domestic.

That's why I need your help!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hnMnSaqE0_6OuRU&b=jaJ6nJ0lyHdSDOkjYA_kqA

Darren Soto will have all of Nancy Pelosi's Swamp money. That's why I need your help today- to replace Darren Soto, and support the President!

Will you join this fight with me? I need your help!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hnMnSaqE0_6OuRU&b=jaJ6nJ0lyHdSDOkjYA_kqA

Can you help me?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hnMnSaqE0_6OuRU&b=jaJ6nJ0lyHdSDOkjYA_kqA
I have a big fundraising deadline TODAY- and I'm still about $9,000

short of my goal. I need you to help me reach my goal!

Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hnMnSaqE0_6OuRU&b=jaJ6nJ0lyHdSDOkjYA_kqA
of $15, $35, $60, $250, $500, $1000.... all the way to the Federal maximum donation of $2800 per individual, $5600 per couple? I appreciate whatever you can send so we can defeat socialist Darren Soto!

The radical Democrats are going to lose BIG this year - with your help!

Let's get this done!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hnMnSaqE0_6OuRU&b=jaJ6nJ0lyHdSDOkjYA_kqA

Bill Olson

Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars

Supports President Trump

Not a Career Politician

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hnMnSaqE0_6OuRU&b=jaJ6nJ0lyHdSDOkjYA_kqA

P.S. I really need your help today

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hnMnSaqE0_6OuRU&b=jaJ6nJ0lyHdSDOkjYA_kqA
, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - WITH YOUR HELP!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hnMnSaqE0_6OuRU&b=jaJ6nJ0lyHdSDOkjYA_kqA
Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.

body:
Tap or click to read more >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/9914d0be0c5eda98/3fd6413a4ec27e9ac3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter, I'm sure you've heard the news about President Trump coming to Portsmouth this weekend by now. But there's much more going on than just the rally! Before the rally at 1:00pm, I'll be joining the rest of the Trump New Hampshire ticket in hosting a Sign Wave! This is a great opportunity to demonstrate to everyone how strong we are together, _and to show President Trump that New Hampshire is showing up big time to support him!
_ [Show Your Support - RSVP to Our Sign Wave Now!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/9914d0be0c5eda98/ab4d098d98b023c8c3d6b838967d376c/33153) Exact details such as location will be given to those who RSVP before the rally. _**[All you need to do is click or tap here to add your name on the list!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/9914d0be0c5eda98/ce0266eff53409e0c3d6b838967d376c/33153)**_

It's going to be a great evening, and I hope you can join us.

I look forward to seeing you Saturday!

\- Corky Messner | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/9914d0be0c5eda98/7b17d2e8deb3071ec3d6b838967d376c/33153) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/9914d0be0c5eda98/82a956ec884fd40fc3d6b838967d376c/33153)

name: Mayor Pete Buttigieg
subject: MJ Hegar can win it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890152/7f51f7bc/41239cb5/4ef60896/1369799862/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter,

There is so much at stake this November, Peter. I said it on the campaign trail, and I'll say it again now: In order to make change in this country, we can't just focus on the White House -- **we need to flip the Senate in order to win the era.**

It only takes four seats to win back the Senate and break Mitch McConnell's stranglehold on progress. Texas is the biggest battleground state in this election, and MJ Hegar can win it.

**[Will you join me in supporting MJ by making a donation of whatever you can to help her win Texas and flip the Senate?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890152/7f51f7bc/41239cb5/4ef60895/1369799862/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2ODcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-buttigieg?refcode=email_20200708.2nd__1687__&amount=10")**

A lot of career politicians like Sen. Cornyn treat service as just another word for politics as usual, one partisan press release or Capitol Hill meeting at a time. But MJ and I have both served our country in uniform, and she knows that there's a different spirit of public service that we need much more of in Washington. It means putting country over politics and always upholding the oath we took to support and defend our Constitution -- no matter what.

Politicians like Mitch McConnell and his right-hand man Sen. Cornyn have made it absolutely clear they're not willing to put the well-being of our country and our people over their political agendas.

I believe there's a better way forward, and that's why I believe in MJ. **[I'm asking you to join me today in supporting her. Will you pitch in right now to elect MJ and help flip the Senate this November?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890152/7f51f7bc/41239cb5/4ef60895/1369799862/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2ODcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-buttigieg?refcode=email_20200708.2nd__1687__&amount=10")**

One more critical thing: Control of the Senate won't be the only outcome of this election here in Texas. **If we don 't flip the Senate, we will lose the Supreme Court for decades to come with more justices like Brett Kavanaugh and Neil Gorsuch.**

We cannot let that happen. That's why MJ and I are counting on you. | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890152/7f51f7bc/41239cb5/4ef60894/1369799862/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2ODcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-buttigieg?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200708.2nd__1687__&amount=5")**
**[Express donate $10>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890152/7f51f7bc/41239cb5/4ef6088b/1369799862/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2ODcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-buttigieg?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200708.2nd__1687__&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890152/7f51f7bc/41239cb5/4ef6088a/1369799862/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2ODcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-buttigieg?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200708.2nd__1687__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890152/7f51f7bc/41239cb5/4ef60889/1369799862/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2ODcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-buttigieg?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200708.2nd__1687__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890152/7f51f7bc/41239cb5/4ef60888/1369799862/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2ODcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-buttigieg?refcode=email_20200708.2nd__1687__")**
Thanks for helping, and I'm wishing you and your loved ones well.

Pete Buttigieg

**[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890152/7f51f7bc/41239cb5/4ef60895/1369799862/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2ODcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-buttigieg?refcode=email_20200708.2nd__1687__&amount=10")**

|

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890152/7f51f7bc/41239cb5/4ef6088f/1369799862/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2ODcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1687&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890152/7f51f7bc/41239cb5/4ef6088e/1369799862/VEsHBA/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.

name: Madison Hinz
subject: Jessi Melton Super Saturday Phone Banking and Walking
body:
Hi everyone,

This Saturday, we're going to have an opportunity for volunteers to get together and phone bank and walk as a group to get Jessi's message out and secure votes for her in district 22.

From 2:30-6:30 pm, we'll meet at The Griddle in Boca Raton (address below) to have a group of people making calls together, as well as a couple groups that want to canvass the surrounding neighborhoods.

If you are able to come, and if you have a preference between door knocking and phone banking, please let me know ahead of time, so I can organize some groups for it.

The Griddle
275 NE Spanish River Blvd.
Boca Raton, FL, 33431

Madison Hinz
Executive Assistant & Volunteer Coordinator
Jessi Melton for Congress 2020
FL-22 (R)
(954)837-3566
[madison@jessiforcongress.com](mailto:madison@jessiforcongress.com)
<https://secure.anedot.com/jessi-melton-for-congress/donate>

| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf09/1cd0ac28/88452236/357cfe87/3687243309/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf09/1cd0ac28/88452236/357cfe86/3687243309/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf09/1cd0ac28/88452236/357cfe85/3687243309/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf09/1cd0ac28/88452236/357cfe84/3687243309/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf09/1cd0ac28/88452236/357cfe83/3687243309/VEsEBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf09/1cd0ac28/88452236/357cfe82/3687243309/VEsEBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf09/1cd0ac28/88452236/357cfe81/3687243309/VEsEBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf09/1cd0ac28/88452236/357cfe80/3687243309/VEsEBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf09/1cd0ac28/88452236/357cff7f/3687243309/VEsEAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf09/1cd0ac28/88452236/357cff7e/3687243309/VEsEAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf09/1cd0ac28/88452236/357cfe81/3687243309/VEsEAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf09/1cd0ac28/88452236/357cff7c/3687243309/VEsEDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

name: Kim Mangone
subject: pathetic statement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kim Mangone For Congress
body:
I've got news for Kevin McCarthy.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18183579/219867809/-1741818377?refcode=header-img&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODI4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjBkYjMzMy03M2MxLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CVDqDjaSO1GV12rYJ39WtsAyzJKVtrc2jTvVrvXUICI=)
---
Peter -- My opponent, Republican Leader Kevin McCarthy, made a pathetic attempt to emulate Trump, and issued a disgusting statement on his official Twitter. Take a look: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18183580/219867810/1383213016?refcode=VC_KMFC_20200708_EMDF_E1_T0-S0SL0C0_IN-1_McCarthy-Tweet&amount=10&amounts=3,10,25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODI4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjBkYjMzMy03M2MxLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CVDqDjaSO1GV12rYJ39WtsAyzJKVtrc2jTvVrvXUICI=) Well, I've got news for Kevin McCarthy:

[**I'm a proud Democrat. I'm also a proud United States Air Force veteran. And, by my oath, I love and believe in my country.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18183581/219867811/1383213016?refcode=VC_KMFC_20200708_EMDF_E1_T0-S0SL0C0_IN-1_McCarthy-Tweet&amount=10&amounts=3,10,25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODI4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjBkYjMzMy03M2MxLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CVDqDjaSO1GV12rYJ39WtsAyzJKVtrc2jTvVrvXUICI=)

So, I'm not going to let Trump's most loyal lackey tell me what patriotism looks like.

Kevin McCarthy has never faced a challenger like me before. I know what working families need because I've experienced hardships myself as a single mother to my daughter Kathryn. And I vow to fight like hell for working families -- not special interests -- when I get to Congress.

[**So I'm asking now, Peter: If you're a proud Democrat, will you pitch in $3 to help us crush Kevin McCarthy and shock everyone on Election Day? We set a weekly fundraising goal of $5,500 and we're not on track to reach it right now.
