clean_body: Just checking back in with you to make sure you saw my email yesterday. Republicans in Congress are working hard to confirm good, conservative..... Peter, Just checking back in with you to make sure you saw my email yesterday. Republicans in Congress are working hard to confirm good, conservative judges that will defend our values for decades to come, but radical Democrats are working tooth and nail to make sure they never see the light of day. That’s why I’ve asked strong conservatives like you to make your voice heard: We support conservative judges, and we WILL stand up to defend them! SIGN THE PETITION: I’m hoping that you’ll join me by signing your name in the next 24 hours... before I finalize my list of supporters. I want to have a long list of folks who will do anything to defend our Constitution. Will you join me right now to make sure your name is on the list? \- Rob Portman \---------Forwarded Message Below-------- Peter, What is our Republican Senate majority’s greatest accomplishment? There’s a lot of choices to choose from... tax cuts for working families, new incentives for companies to do business in America, the biggest pay raise ever for our military? While all of these examples are crucially important, there is only one accomplishment that will last a lifetime... the confirmation of hundreds of conservative judges. And Peter... just last week, the Senate confirmed President Trump’s TWO HUNDREDTH judge to the federal bench – a momentous feat. It’s true, Peter, the conservative judges confirmed by the Senate and President Trump will serve as beacons of our conservative values in courtrooms all around the nation, for decades to come. But with every great success comes a new challenge. The left has begun to use these judges as a rallying cry for their radical base. They’re raising money, recruiting volunteers, and taking to the streets to advocate for a future VOID of defenders of conservatism. They want it to be a thing of the past. That’s why I’m asking for your help – we need to act quickly if we’re going to protect the values these good judges are fighting to preserve. They want to restrict our speech and make on-demand abortion an absolute right. They want to grow the size of our government and give more power to politicians and bureaucrats. Peter, Republicans in Congress are working hard to defend these conservative judges, but we need your help. With the power of the grassroots, we can show the left that the American people REJECT their efforts to replace our conservative values. Will you SIGN THE PETITION to help make that statement and PROTECT conservative judges? I’m counting on you to show that you’re in this fight. – Rob Portman Paid for by Rob Portman for Senate

name: Team Christy
subject: Did you hear what Trump did to the Affordable Care Act?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Peter --

While new coronavirus cases were spiking, Donald Trump's administration was _still_ pushing their attack on the Affordable Care Act through the Supreme Court -- and risking kicking another 23 million people off their health care at the time we need it most.

This is the time when we need to protect, enhance, and expand the ACA -- _not destroy it_.

Our best defense against these attacks on our health care is to hold onto the Democratic majority in the House of Representatives -- where they have already passed an ACA expansion. **Mike Garcia? He voted against it.**

If we're going to ensure that the House will defend our access to health care against Republicans like Donald Trump and Mike Garcia, then we _have_ to flip this seat from red to blue.

**[Chip in $5 or more today so we can flip CA-25 from red to blue one more time this November>>](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6baf1/29776869/9f7b29a/569ee00c/807669608/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA3MDhfYWNhZnItZnVsbCJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2007_email_christy?refcode=em20_200708_acafr-full")** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6baf1/29776869/9f7b29a/569ee00d/807669608/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA3MDhfYWNhZnItZnVsbCJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2007_email_christy?refcode=em20_200708_acafr-full&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $25](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6baf1/29776869/9f7b29a/569ee00e/807669608/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA3MDhfYWNhZnItZnVsbCJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2007_email_christy?refcode=em20_200708_acafr-full&express_lane=true&amount=25")

[Express Donate $250](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6baf1/29776869/9f7b29a/569ee009/807669608/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA3MDhfYWNhZnItZnVsbCJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2007_email_christy?refcode=em20_200708_acafr-full&express_lane=true&amount=250") | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6baf1/29776869/9f7b29a/569ee00c/807669608/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA3MDhfYWNhZnItZnVsbCJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2007_email_christy?refcode=em20_200708_acafr-full")
It's clear that Trump and his far-right cronies like Garcia care more about dismantling President Obama's signature law than they do about ensuring folks can afford the care they need.

Our leaders should be pushing policies that give _more_ Americans _better_ care -- not trying to strike down the ACA through the courts. They should be doing everything possible to make the health care system work for people, not profits.

Mike Garcia proved he doesn't get it when he voted against the expansion of the ACA.

**If we don't hold onto the Democratic majority in the House, Republicans may finally get what they've always dreamed of -- completely dismantling the ACA.**

**[That's why this race is so important -- the path to protecting the majority runs through CA-25 and our top tier race. Click here to pitch in $5 or more to flip this seat and elect a representative who will fight for better health care for everyone.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6baf1/29776869/9f7b29a/569ee00c/807669608/VEsO/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA3MDhfYWNhZnItZnVsbCJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2007_email_christy?refcode=em20_200708_acafr-full")**

Thanks,

Team Christy

name: MichaelBennet.com
subject: ADD YOUR NAME → Don’t cut funding for USPS!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18183738/219873172/721416609?refcode=footer&amount=25&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjFlNDcxZi03N2MxLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-Fczo5pEatNO29dYqXJE5kDOP0l1tXZcCkXuWyi7fzk=)
| | Team,

The United States Postal Service is one of our nation’s oldest and most important institutions. All across the country, Americans rely on the Postal Service to receive their paychecks, refill prescriptions, and – in states like Colorado – mail in their voting ballots!

Now, when postal workers are putting their lives on the line to process our mail, Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans are preparing to gut USPS funding! President Trump has even threatened to veto legislation that provides federal financial relief to the USPS.

If the Postal Service goes under, more than 600,000 Americans could lose their jobs.

_This is an absolute disaster, team._

[The Postal Service has delivered for us, rain or shine. clean_body: = | | Team, The United States Postal Service is one of our nation’s oldest and most important institutions. All across the country, Americans rely on the Postal Service to receive their paychecks, refill prescriptions, and – in states like Colorado – mail in their voting ballots! Now, when postal workers are putting their lives on the line to process our mail, Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans are preparing to gut USPS funding! President Trump has even threatened to veto legislation that provides federal financial relief to the USPS. If the Postal Service goes under, more than 600,000 Americans could lose their jobs. This is an absolute disaster, team. = = | | = Let’s do this, Team Bennet Thank you for being a part of Michael’s re-election campaign!** Sending emails is a crucial way to keep supporters like you updated on what Michael is doing in Colorado and Washington D.C. to fight for progress in a purple state. | | Friend, Election day is rapidly approaching. It's less than four months away! This election looks and feels different than any other in our history, but that doesn't change the amount of work it will take to protect the DFL majority. As I write this email, our field team is making phone calls across the state and our candidates are finding new ways to contact their neighbors. Campaigning in the COVID-19 world has its challenges -- and it certainly has its price tag. Would you help out our campaign _for free_ today? **Minnesota residents can make a $50 (or $100 per couple) contribution once per year and it will be completely refunded by the state.** _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately_ [**Refundable $50**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Gp0SxzXCh6W67CrmQY8BKTdSC2J6Oco57WEEgoW4AGc=/sAZc1BVJ0_DSb9FvmwqmPk0f42-Z37KmvszZmiEhRW0=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=070820) [**Refundable $100**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Gp0SxzXCh6W67CrmQY8BKTdSC2J6Oco57WEEgoW4AGc=/sAZc1BVJ0_DSb9FvmwqmPk0f42-Z37KmvszZmiEhRW0=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=070820) _You can donate $50 (or $100 per couple) and it will be refunded to you by the state through the Minnesota Political Contribution Refund Program._ Time is running out. name: Tina Smith
subject: I never expected this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
I always knew Donald Trump would spend outrageous amounts of money to win Minnesota. But I never expected his campaign would already be pouring more than $6 million into our state — with no sign of stopping. Just this morning, my team and I got word that the Trump campaign has begun placing seven-figure ad buys in Minnesota for the fall. That’s on top of the six-figure buys they have already made here. And I'm sure more will follow, especially as we get closer and closer to Election Day. **Make no mistake: This sort of spending could give our Republican opponent a boost in this race and help him ride Trump’s coattails to victory in Minnesota.** We're running out of time to make sure we're ready for the avalanche of money that's about to hit us through the airwaves. name: James Mackler
subject: 63% of Tennesseans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Mackler for U
body:
Want to expand Medicaid
|
---
[ ](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa137/18d6a294/4c9a6374/26d7f36c/309355955/VEsH/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://www.jamesmackler.com/")

| | It's wrong -- Tennessee is one of just 13 states that still haven't expanded Medicaid even though 63% of Tennesseans support doing so. And with this administration's judicial assault on pre-existing conditions, access to health care for so many across Tennessee hangs in the balance in the election for Tennessee's open U.S. Senate seat. I'm a combat veteran who knows that access to health care is a right. That's why I'm running, and it's why I launched my campaign at a closed rural hospital in McKenzie. In the Senate, I'll work with anyone to improve health care by fixing the Affordable Care Act, expanding Medicaid so we stop losing our rural hospitals, and allowing the government to negotiate lower prices for prescription drugs. [_**Will you stand with me to demand Medicaid expansion?**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa137/18d6a294/4c9a6374/26d7f36d/309355955/VEsE/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.jamesmackler.com/e200708pet") | | | [Add Your Name >>](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa137/18d6a294/4c9a6374/26d7f36d/309355955/VEsF/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.jamesmackler.com/e200708pet")
---
Right now in Tennessee, our health care system leaves too many of our friends and neighbors with the impossible choice of paying for medical care or putting food on the table.
By refusing to expand Medicaid, our state has forfeited billions in federal funding over the last 10 years, and as a result, our rural hospitals have been forced to close, making Tennessee the state with the most closed rural hospitals per person.
If our state legislature's gerrymandered supermajority won't expand Medicaid -- overruling 63% of Tennesseans -- I'll make sure it gets done while we fix the Affordable Care Act in Congress.
[_**Stand with me and demand Medicaid expansion today ->**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa137/18d6a294/4c9a6374/26d7f36d/309355955/VEsC/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.jamesmackler.com/e200708pet")
| | [Add Your Name >>](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa137/18d6a294/4c9a6374/26d7f36d/309355955/VEsD/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.jamesmackler.com/e200708pet")
---
In service,
James

|
---
| | Paid for by James Mackler for U.S. Senate
---
James Mackler is a member of the Tennessee National Guard and a former member of the U.S. Army. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Tennessee National Guard, the Department of the Army, or the Department of Defense. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: re: Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
Texas has a special place in my heart (go Cougars!). Today, I'm asking if you can help support three terrific Democratic U.S. House candidates who can flip three seats in Texas and expand our House... | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285250d7/45c30650/1cf2ce414/66e85ba4/2044201909/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Texas has a special place in my heart.

It's where I got my second chance at college, for $50 a semester at the University of Houston (go Cougars!). It's where my Aunt Bee rescued me by moving to help with child care. It's where I started teaching Sunday school and bankruptcy law, and it's where I started studying how our economy lays traps for working people.

In Texas, I saw what can happen when a person has a fighting chance to build something real. I saw how we can lift each other up. And I saw what we're up against: a system where the rules are tilted to benefit the wealthy and well-connected.

We can rewrite those rules and give everyone the opportunity to thrive -- but first, we need to elect Democrats up and down the ballot in 2020. And Texas is going to be a big part of that.

**Today, I'm asking if you can help support three terrific Democratic U.S. House candidates who can flip three seats in Texas and expand our House majority.**

Candace Valenzuela (Texas 24th District) and Mike Siegel (Texas 10th) have primary run-off elections next Tuesday. Julie Oliver (Texas 25th) is already on the ballot for November, and she needs to make investments right now to beat her GOP opponent.

**[If you're in a place to make a donation, will you chip in to help elect Candace Valenzuela, Mike Siegel, and Julie Oliver, and support Warren Democrats like them across the country? They need our grassroots movement fighting by their side, and $2 or whatever you can contribute would make a real difference.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285250d7/45c30650/1cf2ce414/66e85ba7/2044201909/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWN2LW1zLWpvIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVQwNl9FR1JfRU5EX0VfMjAyMDA3MDhfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-cv-ms-jo?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMT06_EGR_END_E_20200708_V1S1_P")**

I'm so proud to endorse these three strong fighters.

As an educator and former school board leader, Candace Valenzuela knows first-hand the struggles that working families face. I know she'll be an unwavering force in Congress that will fight tirelessly for them both at home and in Washington.

Mike Siegel is a civil rights lawyer and a former public school teacher. He has been on the right side of critical fights for our children, our planet, and for civil rights and social justice. And we need his fighting spirit in Washington.

Julie Oliver grew up poor, and she was homeless and pregnant at 17. She took care of her family and put herself through college and law school with the help of Medicaid and Pell Grants. She knows deeply the struggles families face, and I know she'll fight like hell for Texas in Congress.

**Working people need these three champions in Congress. And we can help make sure they win -- but only if we pitch in however we can.

[If you can, please split a donation today between Candace Valenzuela, Mike Siegel, Julie Oliver, and our re-election campaign. Let's expand our House majority. Let's flip Texas. And let's make our country work for everyone -- not just a thin slice at the top.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285250d7/45c30650/1cf2ce414/66e85ba7/2044201909/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWN2LW1zLWpvIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVQwNl9FR1JfRU5EX0VfMjAyMDA3MDhfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-cv-ms-jo?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMT06_EGR_END_E_20200708_V1S1_P")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

clean_body: Texas has a special place in my heart (go Cougars!). Today, I'm asking if you can help support three terrific Democratic U.S. House candidates who can flip three seats in Texas and expand our House... | | | "" Texas has a special place in my heart. It's where I got my second chance at college, for $50 a semester at the University of Houston (go Cougars!). It's where my Aunt Bee rescued me by moving to help with child care. It's where I started teaching Sunday school and bankruptcy law, and it's where I started studying how our economy lays traps for working people. In Texas, I saw what can happen when a person has a fighting chance to build something real. I saw how we can lift each other up. And I saw what we're up against: a system where the rules are tilted to benefit the wealthy and well-connected. We can rewrite those rules and give everyone the opportunity to thrive -- but first, we need to elect Democrats up and down the ballot in 2020. And Texas is going to be a big part of that. Today, I'm asking if you can help support three terrific Democratic U.S. House candidates who can flip three seats in Texas and expand our House majority. Candace Valenzuela (Texas 24th District) and Mike Siegel (Texas 10th) have primary run-off elections next Tuesday. Julie Oliver (Texas 25th) is already on the ballot for November, and she needs to make investments right now to beat her GOP opponent. "" I'm so proud to endorse these three strong fighters. As an educator and former school board leader, Candace Valenzuela knows first-hand the struggles that working families face. I know she'll be an unwavering force in Congress that will fight tirelessly for them both at home and in Washington. Mike Siegel is a civil rights lawyer and a former public school teacher. He has been on the right side of critical fights for our children, our planet, and for civil rights and social justice. And we need his fighting spirit in Washington. Julie Oliver grew up poor, and she was homeless and pregnant at 17. She took care of her family and put herself through college and law school with the help of Medicaid and Pell Grants. name: Raphael Warnock
subject: Kelly Loeffler is playing to the worst of politics
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |
---
Friend,

The Black Lives Matter movement is an effort to give voice to the problems of racial injustice and bigotry in our country - but my Republican opponent, Sen. Kelly Loeffler, is shamefully attacking it.
She claims that this movement for equality "promotes violence," she refers to protesters as "mob rule" and now this: **As co-owner of Atlanta's WNBA franchise, Loeffler is rejecting a league-wide initiative to support the Black Lives Matter movement, silencing players who are advocating for meaningful change across the country.**
As Americans march for justice and equality, Kelly is giving in to the narrow impulses of tribalism and bigotry, and accusing me of being on the wrong side of history. She'd like to dismiss me - my decades fighting alongside Georgians for everything from health care to voting rights, and my experience preaching from Dr. King's pulpit - but I'm not going anywhere.
I've dedicated my life to fighting tough fights and serving others - and it's what I'm prepared to do to win this race and become Georgia's first-ever Black senator. But I need your help: **Loeffler is spending $20 million of her personal fortune to buy this seat, and our grassroots campaign won't be able to defeat her and bring the urgent change we so desperately need unless people like you are by my side.**
**[Can you give $5 or more now so we can make _history_ , flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats? We have a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to win in Georgia and bring critical fights for justice to Washington - but only if you chip in now.](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e50f/288179be/816ac5f/348e5d7a/14637877/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrNDI1LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk425-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Let me be clear:**** This is nothing more than an effort to sow division and out-Trump Doug Collins, another extremist Republican who's running to keep this seat red and protect Mitch McConnell's Senate majority. Now, more than ever, we need real leadership in Washington, and Kelly's shown she's not up to the task.
**That's exactly why we need to defeat the GOP, win in Georgia and make sure that _everyone_ -_ _ no matter the color of your skin or where you come from - has a voice in our democracy:** **[Please, friend, at this critical moment, can I count on you to give $5 or more now to reject Kelly Loeffler and help us flip Georgia blue?](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e50f/288179be/816ac5f/348e5d7a/14637877/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrNDI1LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk425-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $5](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk425-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=5")

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: WATCH LIVE: President Trump and President of Mexico speak at 6:35 p.m. ET
body:
President Trump is hosting President of Mexico Andres Manuel Lopez Obrador today at the White House | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fe8ba91af6&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • July 8, 2020
---
| | |
# **LIVE: President Trump and President of Mexico speak at 6:35 p.m. ET**

**President Trump** is hosting President of Mexico Andres Manuel Lopez Obrador today at the White House, where the two leaders just signed a joint declaration on the U.S.-Mexico partnership. The trip marks President Lopez Obrador’s first foreign visit in office.

[**LIVE at 6:35 p.m. ET: President Trump and President Lopez Obrador deliver joint statement**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a04360019c&e=3ee4985eea)

**“Mexico became** the largest goods trading partner of the United States for the first time in 2019,” the statement reads. “Every day, $1.6 billion worth of trade crosses our border, directly supporting American and Mexican businesses, jobs, and workers.”

**Just last week,** President Trump’s NAFTA-replacing U.S.-Mexico-Canada Agreement (USMCA) took effect. USMCA recommits North America to generating prosperity for ALL of its citizens and strengthening the joint fight against global trade corruption.

**President Trump** has also worked extensively with Mexico to curb the surge of illegal immigration at our border. At the Trump Administration’s urging, Mexico has bolstered its border security efforts and deployed thousands of troops to disrupt human smuggling.

**“I want to thank Mexico** because Mexico is doing a lot right now,” President Trump said after the deal took effect last summer. “They have almost 20,000 soldiers between the two borders. They have 6,000 on their southern border by Guatemala. And they have about . . . 16,000 at our southern border.”

**These strong actions** by President Trump and Mexico caused U.S. Border Patrol enforcement encounters to fall drastically from 132,856 last May to 21,475 in May 2020.

🎬 [President Trump welcomes President Lopez Obrador to the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c2ce3e20d1&e=3ee4985eea)

[_Read the Joint Declaration between President Trump and President Lopez Obrador._](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=42c0fc4363&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **Statement from Press Secretary on religious liberty**

**This morning,** the Supreme Court issued a 7-2 decision that delivers a major victory for both religious freedom and freedom of conscience in America.

**In Press Secretary** Kayleigh McEnany’s words:
> _Almost a decade ago, the Obama administration attempted to force employers, including religious nonprofits like the Little Sisters of the Poor, an order of nuns, to provide contraceptive coverage to their employees, in violation of their religious beliefs. . . .
>
> Since Day One, the Trump Administration has sought to lift burdens on religious exercise for people of all faiths. As the Supreme Court has previously stated, protecting the ability of people to worship and live according to the dictates of their conscience is part of “the best of our traditions.” The Court’s decision today carries forward that noble tradition._
[See the Press Secretary’s full statement on today’s ruling.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=593634ad7f&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **President Trump and President Lopez Obrador sign a joint declaration in the Rose Garden** | July 8, 2020
---
|

name: Barack Obama Alert (via 314 Action)
subject: An urgent plea from the former President
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 314 Action Fund, 314action

314 Action is a grassroots community of over 2.1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.

If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can **[click here](https://act.314actionfund.org/page/m/29bb7f19/4bd7760e/5f2607a0/77a9adfe/2933338343/VEsHBg/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-emfooter?refcode=emfooter&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=13+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_200708_6MO-6MC-6M5xAT_none_STD_2_obama&source=314_EM_FR_200708_6MO-6MC-6M5xAT_none_STD_2_obama")** to make a donation.

To get text message updates from 314 Action text 314 to 31498.

name: Amanda Makki
subject: Florida State Representative "Jamie" Grant Endorsement
body:
"The hard-working people of Pinellas County cannot count on Charlie Crist. For nearly three decades he's been a political wind sock, being blown whichever way the wind goes. Our families and this community need real leadership to emerge from this crisis and we simply cannot trust Charlie."

- Florida State Representative "Jamie" J.W. Grant on his endorsement of Amanda Makki

"I am honored to have the support from Representative Grant and appreciate his efforts on behalf of Pinellas County in Tallahassee. It will take committed Republican leaders at every level of government to bring conservative change to our community, so I look forward t working with him to represent Pinellas County and to put us back on the road to recovery after COVID-19."

Amanda

Amanda Makki for Congress

Republican Candidate for Florida’s 13th District

727-735-5921

For Online Contributions: www.amandamakki.com

For Contributions via Mail, please send to:

Amanda Makki for Congress

PO Box 47483

St. Petersburg, FL 33743

-=-=-

Amanda Makki for Congress - FL 33743, United States

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. To stop receiving emails: https://makki.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe

-=-=-

name: =?utf-8?Q?Elisa=20Cardnell?=
subject: Ivanka doesn't get it
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
---
| [Chip in](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=1c621f0c39&e=3f151f8b74 "Chip in")
---
|
### Friend-

Yesterday Ivanka Trump highlighted the fact that single moms disproportionately bear the burden of our economy. She was right about that part- **but she has the wrong solution.**

### The primary purpose of schools isn't to be childcare. The policies to help parents, during Covid and after, are paid sick leave, universal healthcare, and economic stimulus for the middle class.

### The right priority now is to protect lives and to enact policy to reflect the reality of unemployment, physical distancing, and the need for essential workers to have childcare. These policies aren't as simple as merely mandating that schools reopen - that's shortsighted and an oversimplified answer.

### Moms in Office is dedicated to advocating for families. We know that reopening schools safely for kids and teachers is important - we cannot afford to be reckless with lives. The economy will eventually recover, but the dead can't.

### Reopening schools should not be a political decision - it is a public health decision affecting kids, families, teachers, and staff. Moms (and dads) across the country should not be forced to decide between their children's safety and their job.

### Thanks for all you do,

### Elisa Cardnell
### Executive Director, Moms in Office

---
